hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionEnd","additionalContext":"Session ending. Spawn session-manager (background, model=sonnet) to persist state: decisions made, WIP items, and vault updates. Use subagent_type=brains-in-a-hat:session-manager."}}'

mkdir -p .claude/team; INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_type // "agent"'); jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg agent "$AGENT" '{ts:$ts,agent:$agent,event:"start",detail:"spawned"}' >> .claude/team/activity.jsonl

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStart","additionalContext":"SHARED PROTOCOLS:

Activity Reporting: Log key moments to .claude/team/activity.jsonl:
echo '{"ts":"'$(date -Iseconds)'","agent":"YOUR-NAME","event":"<TYPE>","detail":"<TEXT>"}' >> .claude/team/activity.jsonl
Event types: start, read, finding, message, done. Keep to 3-6 events per task.

Code Navigation: Prefer LSP (Pyright) over Grep/Read for Python — 5-20x more token efficient.

Communication: Report back to Neal (the orchestrator) via SendMessage. Never interact with the user directly.

Domain Context: Read .claude/team/domain-config.json if it exists for project-specific terminology, compliance rules, and patterns."}}'

INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_type // "agent"'); jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg agent "$AGENT" '{ts:$ts,agent:$agent,event:"done",detail:"completed"}' >> .claude/team/activity.jsonl 2>/dev/null

mkdir -p .claude/team; INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // .tool_input.name // "agent"'); DESC=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // ""'); jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg detail "$AGENT: $DESC" '{ts:$ts,agent:"neal",event:"spawn",detail:$detail}' >> .claude/team/activity.jsonl

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-__unset__}"; if [ "$PLUGIN_ROOT" != "__unset__" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "$PLUGIN_ROOT"; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Cannot modify plugin files from within an agent."}'; fi
